creator: tcberner@freebsd.org
text:
moin moin 

Why are you not simply walking the tree manually and running a command?

for cat in ($(make -VSUBDIR)) ;
  for prt in ($(make -VSUBDIR -C${cat})) ; ...
    yourthing $cat/$prt
  done
done

I don't quite see at the moment what the benefit is of using the describe target here.


mfg Tobias
